---
id: artifact-show
title: "Get a specific build artifact"
description: "Retrieve data of a specific build artifact. The endpoint can retrieve archived artifacts as well. The response output contains a time-limited download url (expires in 10 minutes) and a public install-page URL. You can view the build artifact with both URLs, but the public install-page url will not work unless you [enable it](https://devcenter.bitrise.io/tutorials/deploy/bitrise-app-deployment/#enabling-public-page-for-the-app)."
sidebar_label: "Get a specific build artifact"
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "get api-method"
info_path: en/bitrise-ci/api/api-reference/bitrise-api
custom_edit_url: null
---

import MethodEndpoint from "@theme/ApiExplorer/MethodEndpoint";
import ParamsDetails from "@theme/ParamsDetails";
import RequestSchema from "@theme/RequestSchema";
import StatusCodes from "@theme/StatusCodes";
import OperationTabs from "@theme/OperationTabs";
import TabItem from "@theme/TabItem";
import Heading from "@theme/Heading";
import Translate from "@docusaurus/Translate";

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Get a specific build artifact"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"get"}
  path={"/apps/{app-slug}/builds/{build-slug}/artifacts/{artifact-slug}"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Retrieve data of a specific build artifact. The endpoint can retrieve archived artifacts as well. The response output contains a time-limited download url (expires in 10 minutes) and a public install-page URL. You can view the build artifact with both URLs, but the public install-page url will not work unless you [enable it](https://devcenter.bitrise.io/tutorials/deploy/bitrise-app-deployment/#enabling-public-page-for-the-app).

  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
>
  <Translate id="theme.openapi.request.title">Request</Translate>
</Heading>

>
  
</ParamsDetails>
